articles.title: Royal Family watch Red Arrows flypast on Buckingham Palace balcony
articles.description: The annual event marks the King's official birthday and features more than 1,400 members of the armed forces.

articles.title: Molly Russell's dad says PM rushing social media restrictions 'deplorable'
articles.description: Father of a teenager who took her own life after viewing harmful content says plans appear to have been brought forward for a "political reason".

articles.description: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister says a deal to end fighting with the US is close.
